shoppinglist.languagePrompt: First up, pick your vibe and where you wanna land to get rolling with Murmli.
shoppinglist.welcome:
Welcome to Murmli, your ultimate wingman for recipes, shopping, and fuel.

 This app rides the AI wave to make translations, hacks, and recipe picking a total breeze. You can even craft your own secret recipes and drop 'em straight into the list to keep your daily ride smooth.
shoppinglist.quickGuide:
Just drop whatever you’re vibing for into the box, and Murmli’s AI will paddle it right into your shopping list.

 Everything’s sorted by supermarket zones so you don't wipe out looking for stuff.

 Once they're in, just tap 'em to find some sweet alternatives.
shoppinglist.options: Find more sick moves like sharing or sorting in the top right corner. Share the stoke with your partner so you can paddle together. You can cut the line whenever you want.

planner.welcome: Tell us how many bros you're feeding and how many recipes you’re planning. Just talk normal in the text box—our AI catches the drift and finds exactly what you’re craving (like veggie fuel for athletes).
planner.options:
Recipes are rolling in now.
Give a shaka (thumbs up) if it’s a ripper, or thumbs down if it’s a wipeout. 

The system learns your style to bring you better sets next time.
planner.shoppinglist:
Once you’ve picked your lineup, you’ll drift straight to the shopping list with all the gear you need. 

 Check under 'Recipes' for your picks and the how-to. You can rate 'em and drop a review there.

recipes.overview: Here’s the lineup of recipes for your stash, your own creations, and your favorites. Just dive in from here.
recipes.create: Hit that plus sign in the corner to cook up your own thing. Just drop the idea, the AI generates the flow, and you can even snap a pic of your ingredients.
recipes.addToList: Wanna bring a favorite to the party? Open the recipe and drop it into your stash using the three-dot menu on the top right.

tracker.overview:
Just write down what you inhaled. 

Talk like a local—'a plate of pasta' or specific products—it all works. No stress.
tracker.calorieGoal:
Set your own daily burn or let us handle the math. 

Just drop your body stats once, and we’ll catch the wave for you.
tracker.activityTracking: Track your sessions too, like 'jogging for 20 mins'. We’ll calculate how much extra fuel you can grab—totally custom for your vibe.

setup.aboutApp: This app was shaped in a private garage to make the shopping and meal-planning ride a whole lot smoother.

helpPage.title: Help & Video Sessions
helpPage.intro: Here’s a collection of short clips showing you how to ride the Murmli waves. Watch 'em here, on YouTube, or go full-screen and enjoy the show.

overview.title: The Big Picture
overview.description: A quick flight over Murmli and all the main spots in the app.

firstStart.title: First Paddle Out
firstStart.description: How to set up Murmli and find your balance on the very first day.

shoppingList.title: The Stash
shoppingList.description: Tricks for the smart shopping list—adding, sorting, and sharing the stoke.

planner.title: The Planner
planner.description: Learn how to plan your eats, tell the AI your wishes, and catch automatic suggestions.

calorieCounter.title: The Fuel Counter
calorieCounter.description: How to keep an eye on your fuel and sessions with the counter.

training.title: Workouts & Logs
training.description: Build your sessions, log your sets, and track your progress.

settings.title: Gear & Final Word
settings.description: All about the settings and the road ahead.

general.errorMessage: Something went wrong, man. Try again in a bit or let us know about the crash.

notifications.recipeReadyMessage: Your recipe is ready to shred.
notifications.trainingPlanReadyMessage: Your workout plan is locked and loaded.

feedback.title: Fresh Vibes
feedback.success: Yo, some rad new feedback just washed ashore on one of your recipes.

deleteRecipeDialog.dialogMsg: You sure you wanna toss this recipe back into the ocean?

general.voiceDialogInfo: Recording now, man. You can ditch it anytime. If you send it, we’ll process the vibe automatically.
general.name: The Tag
general.cameraError: Bummer, lens wipeout! Camera's acting totally gnarly
general.cameraPermissionDenied: Whoa there, access denied! The wave is closed
general.unsavedChangesMessage: Whoa there! You've got some gnarly tweaks that aren't locked in yet. You sure you want to bail and let those changes wash away, man?

shoppingList.noItemsMessage: The stash is empty, man. Go grab something.
shoppingList.noSharedUsers: No one else is on this wave yet.

sortCategoriesDialog.title: Sort the Tides
sortCategoriesDialog.text: Tap a spot to move things around or use the arrows.

removeRecipes.dialogMsg: You sure you wanna clear the recipes from your stash? The ingredients stay, you gotta clear 'em manually.

removeIngredients.dialogMsg: Clear the ingredients? The recipes stay in the view, no worries.

clearAll.dialogMsg: Wanna wipe the whole list clean?

deleteList.dialogMsg: Delete the whole damn list? Really?

shoppingList.deleteConfirmTooltip: Tap again to be super sure.
shoppingList.voiceRecordingInfo: Mic is live. Just say what you need for the stash. We'll handle the rest. If you bail, just delete it. Nothing leaves your board until you hit send.
shoppingList.offlineMode: No signal—saving stuff locally for now.
shoppingList.pendingItemTooltip: This gear will sync once we catch a signal

planner.title: Wave Planner
planner.fetchingMessage: Paddling out to get your recipes. Hold tight.

resetSelectionDialog.dialogMsg: You sure you want to clear your picks?

recipes.title: The Cook Book
recipes.noFavorites: No faves yet. Go find some rippers!

tips.swipeToRemove: Swipe left or right to ditch a recipe.
tips.createOwn: Hit the plus sign at the top to build your own stuff.
tips.printPdf: Wanna print? Use the three dots in the corner to make a PDF.
tips.editOwn: Adjust your own gear anytime. Open it and check the menu.
tips.feedbackPlanner: Planner gave you a bad vibe? Give us feedback so we can fix it.

createRecipeDialog.title: Generate the Magic
createRecipeDialog.text: Tell us everything, man. What's in, what's out? The more you tell us, the better we can shape your plate. It takes about 2-3 mins to show up in 'My Recipes'. You can also snap a pic of your fridge to help us out.
createRecipeDialog.label: Recipe Story
createRecipeDialog.generatingText: Building your meal now. Takes about two minutes. You'll see it soon in 'My Recipes'.

recipes.addIngreditensInfo: Add this meal to your current stash? Every ingredient comes with it.
recipes.processingMessage: Cooking it up in the background. We'll ping you.
recipes.readyMessage: Your recipe is ready to surf.

recipe.title: The Recipe

feedback.title: The Review
feedback.label: Your Take
feedback.success: Stoked on your feedback! We're on it.

recipe.promoteStarted: Adding to the global database now, keep it chill.
recipe.promoteInfo: This ripper is already in the main set.

chat.title: Chef Chat
chat.welcomeMessage: Aloha! I'm your meal assistant. Ask me anything about the gear or how to prep it.

settings.title: Gear Box
settings.confirmDeleteText: You sure you want to burn this account? No turning back, man.
settings.importWarningText: Importing will wipe your current stats and sign you out. You game?

adminStats.title: The Coast Guard
adminStats.stickinessHint: Daily vs Monthly users. Over 20% means they're hooked on the ride.

feedback.title: Feedback Lineup
feedback.noFeedback: The ocean is flat, man. No feedback yet.
feedback.confirmDelete: Whoa, you sure you wanna wipe this feedback out for good?
feedback.deleteSuccess: Feedback is gone with the tide.
feedback.updateSuccess: Feedback is looking totally righteous now.

adminStats.period7d: Last 7 days of riding the wave

adminTools.title: Admin Deck
adminTools.confirmSendText: This hits EVERYONE. You ready to paddle?
adminTools.sendSuccess: The message has touched the whole coast.
adminTools.forceRatingPrompt: Drop the big one and force that rating pop-up, brah!

contact.title: Reach Out
contact.subtitle: Get in touch on these channels
contact.footer: Stay stoked, send us a word!

tracker.descriptionPlaceholder: What was the vibe of this meal/session?
tracker.activityRequired: Tell us what you did, bro.
tracker.createActivityInfo: Drop your sessions here, we do the math.

palOptions.homeOffice: Home Office – just sitting, chill vibe
palOptions.farmer: Farmer – machine work and manual lifting
palOptions.mountainGuide: Mountain Guide – extreme sessions all day long

tracker.bodyDataInfo: Input your stats here to find your magic fuel numbers. We'll use this to set your daily burn.
tracker.errorNoBodydata: Gotta enter your rider stats before using the meter, bro.
tracker.errorBodydataActivity: Wanna track activity? Give us your stats first.
tracker.voiceRecordingInfo: Saved locally. Hit send to ship it, or ditch to start over.

histamine.title: Histamine
histamine.label: Histamine flow
histamine.description: Checks if the grub is smooth or gnarly for your system.

indicatorSettings.title: Tweak the Tags
indicatorSettings.description: Choose which flags you wanna see on your fuel.
indicatorSettings.histamineDesc: Show histamine level for gut health

tracker.askDialog: Ask for nutrition tips here. We use your stats and the last 14 days of fuel to give you the lowdown.

dietLevelChange.resetMessage: Do you want to wipe the slate clean for your whole diet journey too, man?

chat.title: Fuel Assistant
chat.welcomeMessage: Yo! I'm your tracker buddy. Ask me about your fuel, macros, or habits.

tracker.scalePortion: Tweak the size of the wave
tracker.scaleGroupInfo: Catch a bigger or smaller ride for the whole bowl, man. All the goods get scaled up or down together, totally proportional.
tracker.refineGroupInfo: Tell us how to catch a better wave with this dish (like "less oil, man" or "extra protein for the gains").
tracker.groupName: The name of your epic meal, bro

history.title: Last 10 days of fuel levels, bro

trainingPlans.title: Training Sets

step1.title: Build a Set
step1.content: Make your own workout. Describe exactly where you are, how often you wanna hit it, and how hard the sessions should be.

step2.title: Tweak the Set
step2.content: Not feeling the move? Just tell us in plain talk what needs a change and we'll rebuild the plan.

step3.title: Let's Shred
step3.content: Plans run on clock. Track every set, weight, and rep. At the end, ship the whole thing to the Fuel Tracker to see the burn.

trainingPlans.voiceRecordingInfo: Say what you want in your plan. We’ll convert it once you hit send. Bail if it's not the right vibe.
trainingPlans.createPlanInstructions: Be precise: Muscle groups? How many times a week? Gym or beach? Intense or chill? Give us the dirt so we can build a killer plan just for you.
trainingPlans.subtitle: Build and manage your workout wave here.
trainingPlans.continuePlanDescription: Build a follow-up based on this ride. Add new wishes if you want.
trainingPlans.askDialog: Ask whatever about this set. We'll send your last 10 logs with it.
trainingPlans.noPlansInfo: No plans found. Hit the plus button to catch your first wave.

activateDialog.title: Go Live
activateDialog.msg: Starting this plan locks in the date and lets you track your weekly flow. Ready to drop in?

finishDialog.title: End Journey
finishDialog.msg: Ending this plan resets everything. Ready to walk back to the beach?

trainingPlans.processingMessage: AI is shaping your session. We'll shout when it's ready.

publicRecipe.downloadDescription: Build and share your ripper recipes with the Murmli crew!

training.title: Training Log
training.noPlan: No plans today, or the deck is empty.

appRating.title: You diggin' Murmli, dude?
appRating.description: Murmli is totally free and open-source, man. Since I'm not running any heavy ad vibes, those store ratings really help the tribe find this app. If you're feeling the stoke, I'd be super stoked if you dropped a review!
